ddt:Target.Name: CMF1_Frontal_radar_V4C_0_light
ddt:Target.Description:
ECU : Frontal Radar Functions : ACC/AEBS/DW Vehicle : CMF1
Supplier : TRW (Hexa : 0x545257)
PDE ACC : Jonathan BACH Tel 72254 Author : Jonathan BACH Sce 65360
- V3B.0 - 21/06/2013 Base diag applicable for SW3B
- V3B.1 - 14/07/2013 Screen modifications : 'Specific modes'
- V3B.2 - 15/07/2013 Update of DID : AEBS06_Delta_Vx_b (correction of the lenght)
- V3B.3 - 20/09/2013 'DID modifications : (DID list version v3-12) $0106. Screw_1 & Screw_2 : Change of the resolution, range and min value (additionnal bits necessary and change of the padding) => Change of the DID size. $2004. AzimuthOffset change of the unit (minutes) & range. (additional bits necessary and change of the bit padding) SW : UGRel14a
- V4A-0 - 05/12/2013 'DID modifications : (DID list version v4-1) SW : UGRel15a
- V4B-0 - 05/02/2013 'DID modifications : (DID list version v4-3) SW : UGRel16a (SW4B)
- V4C-0 - 24/02.2016 Add AUTOIDENT for SW UGRel25d (SW9C)

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: DTCCount
Data.Comment: DTC count

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Comment: ECU serial number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Vehicle Identification Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Comment: Software Version (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software Number (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Comment: VDIAG
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Label.Text: Radar identification
ACC track
CW track
After the sending of the request, do not reset the reset. Please wait 7 seconds before switch off/reset the radar.
ECU reset
ECUreset - subfunction 03 softreset : allow to write in no volatile memory the configuration after DataWrite requests.
Send this DID allows to write in no volatile memory the configuration after DataWrite requests.
After the sending of the request, do not reset the reset. Please wait 7 seconds before switch off/reset the radar.
Debug mode
Allow to send debug frames with internal variables.
Only for the developpement.
Routine Calibration In After Sales Market
RESULTS - Alignment_in_AfterSale
At the starting of the routine (active button), the Dfil value shall be not taken into account.
Results (for the Result Request)
To be used only by radar people
Results (for the Result Request)
Routine Calibration In Plants
Take into account these values only if the radar retuns 'FINISHED' AND 'COMPLETED'
Alignment criterias for JFC vehicle:
The radar is align :
- IF Azimuth (°) is in the range [-0.75° ; +0.75°]
- AND IF Elevation (°) is in the range [-0.5° ; +1°]
/!\ To be used only in Plant /!\
RESULTS - Alignment_in_AfterSale
At the starting of the routine (active button), the Dfil value shall be not taken into account.
To be used only by radar people
